comments: Approved. The execution contract scope is correctly bounded to generating only tasks/v0.7-m5-a-state-separation-roadmap.md, and that scope explicitly covers the required roadmap content: target state, intermediate/compatibility state, backward compatibility, and rollback paths. This aligns with the recon packet, which defines the work as drafting the roadmap design document and treats implementation details as analytical inputs rather than executable changes. The out_of_scope section correctly forbids all physical .agent-state/ migration work, any MCP server or bootstrap/script logic modifications, and workflow state semantics changes. The allowed_files list is also properly constrained to the roadmap document, which reinforces the documentation-only boundary for M5-A.
